Operation 'updateCustomer' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Current description lacks clarity about what customer fields can be updated, what is returned, and the effects of the operation. Added details about partial update support, return value, and immediate system effects to improve AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Updates customer information. Either ExternalID or IndividualID must be provided to identify the customer.
data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing customer's contact information and attributes. Requires either ExternalID or IndividualID to identify the target customer. Supports partial updates - only provided fields will be modified. Returns the updated customer object with all current attributes. Changes are immediately reflected in the system.
data.reasoning: Current description lacks clarity about what customer fields can be updated, what is returned, and the effects of the operation. Added details about partial update support, return value, and immediate system effects to improve AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'getMessages' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original description is too generic and lacks input/output details. Enhanced version specifies message types supported, explains that filters are available, describes return structure, and mentions pagination support for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Retrieve messages sent to and received by a business through Everyware's platform.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves SMS and MMS messages sent to and received by a business through the Everyware platform. Accepts filter criteria via request body to narrow results by date range, message type, contact, or direction. Returns an array of message objects with metadata including timestamps, sender/recipient information, and message content. Supports pagination for large result sets.
data.reasoning: Original description is too generic and lacks input/output details. Enhanced version specifies message types supported, explains that filters are available, describes return structure, and mentions pagination support for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'fetchSmsMessages' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details. Summary is too generic ('Fetch SMS messages with filters'). Description lacks output details and pagination information. Improved summary is more descriptive, and enhanced description clarifies return structure and pagination support for better AI agent usability.

data.current_description: Retrieve SMS messages with various filter criteria including date range, direction, and contact information.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve SMS messages with advanced filtering options
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves SMS messages matching specified filter criteria including date range, message direction (inbound/outbound), and contact information. Returns an array of SMS message objects with full metadata including timestamps, sender/recipient phone numbers, message content, and delivery status. Supports pagination for handling large result sets.
data.reasoning: Summary is too generic ('Fetch SMS messages with filters'). Description lacks output details and pagination information. Improved summary is more descriptive, and enhanced description clarifies return structure and pagination support for better AI agent usability.

message: Operation 'createTemplateMessage' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Current description lacks details about required inputs (template ID, recipients), variable substitution capability, return value, and side effects (message queuing). Enhanced description provides comprehensive information for AI agents to understand operation requirements and outcomes.

data.current_summary: Send a message using a pre-created template
data.current_description: Send SMS or MMS messages to contacts using pre-created templates from the Everyware Portal.
data.description_suggestion: Sends SMS or MMS messages to specified contacts using pre-created templates defined in the Everyware Portal. Requires template ID and recipient contact information. Supports variable substitution within templates for personalization. Returns a message object with unique message ID and delivery status. Messages are queued for immediate transmission through the platform.
data.reasoning: Current description lacks details about required inputs (template ID, recipients), variable substitution capability, return value, and side effects (message queuing). Enhanced description provides comprehensive information for AI agents to understand operation requirements and outcomes.

message: Operation 'createInvoice' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Current description is too brief and lacks critical details about required inputs, return value, and system effects. Enhanced version specifies what invoice information is needed, clarifies delivery channel options, describes the returned invoice object, and explains that invoices are queued for delivery and tracked.

data.current_description: Create and send individual invoice links by text, email or both.
data.description_suggestion: Creates an invoice and sends a payment link to the specified contact via SMS, email, or both channels. Requires invoice details (amount, items, recipient contact information) and delivery channel preference. Returns an invoice object with unique invoice ID and payment link. The invoice is immediately queued for delivery and becomes available for payment tracking.
data.reasoning: Current description is too brief and lacks critical details about required inputs, return value, and system effects. Enhanced version specifies what invoice information is needed, clarifies delivery channel options, describes the returned invoice object, and explains that invoices are queued for delivery and tracked.

message: Operation 'sendInvoice' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Current description lacks specificity about what constitutes a 'non-Everyware invoice', required inputs, delivery channels, and return information. Enhanced version clarifies the invoice source distinction, specifies required parameters, lists available delivery channels, and explains the return value and tracking capability for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Submit a non-Everyware invoice into the system for queuing and delivery through messaging channels.
data.description_suggestion: Submits a non-Everyware-generated invoice into the system for queuing and delivery through SMS, email, or other messaging channels. Requires invoice document/data, recipient contact information, and delivery channel preference. Returns a submission confirmation with tracking ID and scheduled delivery status. The invoice is queued for immediate transmission and can be tracked through the platform.
data.reasoning: Current description lacks specificity about what constitutes a 'non-Everyware invoice', required inputs, delivery channels, and return information. Enhanced version clarifies the invoice source distinction, specifies required parameters, lists available delivery channels, and explains the return value and tracking capability for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'onboardMerchant' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description lacks information about what is returned (application ID, status) and the side effects (application enters pending state, asynchronous processing). Enhanced description provides return value details and state change information for better AI agent understanding of the operation's effects.

data.current_description: Submit a new merchant onboarding application with business owner details, business information, and banking details.
data.description_suggestion: Submit a new merchant onboarding application with business owner details, business information, and banking details. Returns an application ID and initial status. The application enters a pending review state and will be processed asynchronously by the onboarding system.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description lacks information about what is returned (application ID, status) and the side effects (application enters pending state, asynchronous processing). Enhanced description provides return value details and state change information for better AI agent understanding of the operation's effects.

message: Operation 'updateInvoiceStatus' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original summary is generic. Description mentions preventing access but doesn't clarify required inputs (invoice ID, status value) or what is returned. Added clarity on inputs, outputs, and side effects for better AI agent decision-making about when to use this operation.

data.current_description: Modify an invoice's status to prevent customer access, typically by changing it to Cancelled.
data.summary_suggestion: Update invoice status and access permissions
data.description_suggestion: Modifies an invoice's status to control customer access. Typically used to cancel invoices and prevent further customer interaction. Requires the invoice ID and target status. Returns the updated invoice object. Side effects include immediate revocation of customer access to the invoice.
data.reasoning: Original summary is generic. Description mentions preventing access but doesn't clarify required inputs (invoice ID, status value) or what is returned. Added clarity on inputs, outputs, and side effects for better AI agent decision-making about when to use this operation.

message: Operation 'createSmsReminder' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description is vague about what 'follow' means and lacks details on required inputs, return value, and scheduling side effects. Enhanced description clarifies the reminder configuration, inputs needed, and automatic delivery behavior.

data.current_summary: Create and send an SMS reminder for an invoice
data.current_description: Configure automatic reminder messages that follow an original SMS invoice.
data.description_suggestion: Creates and sends an automatic SMS reminder message for an invoice. Configures reminder timing and message content to follow an original SMS invoice. Requires invoice ID and reminder configuration parameters. Returns confirmation of the reminder creation. Side effects include scheduling automatic message delivery to the customer.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description is vague about what 'follow' means and lacks details on required inputs, return value, and scheduling side effects. Enhanced description clarifies the reminder configuration, inputs needed, and automatic delivery behavior.

message: Operation 'getSubscriptions' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details. Summary doesn't mention the filtering capability. Description lacks clarity on what is returned and the scope (business-level). Enhanced summary mentions filtering, and description clarifies return structure, scope, and use cases for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Retrieve subscriptions. Set ActiveOnly to true to retrieve only active subscriptions.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of subscriptions for the authenticated business. Supports filtering by status using the ActiveOnly parameter to return only active subscriptions. Returns an array of subscription objects with details including customer, payment method, charge amount, and status. Useful for subscription management and reporting.
data.reasoning: Summary doesn't mention the filtering capability. Description lacks clarity on what is returned and the scope (business-level). Enhanced summary mentions filtering, and description clarifies return structure, scope, and use cases for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'getSubscriptionById' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description is too generic about what 'detailed information' includes. Enhanced description specifies the required input parameter and lists key fields returned to help AI agents understand the operation's scope and capabilities.

data.current_description: Retrieve detailed information for a specific subscription.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed information for a specific subscription by its ID. Returns the complete subscription object including customer details, payment method, recurring charge amount, billing cycle, status, and creation date. Requires the subscription ID as a parameter.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description is too generic about what 'detailed information' includes. Enhanced description specifies the required input parameter and lists key fields returned to help AI agents understand the operation's scope and capabilities.

message: Operation 'updateSubscription' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear. Description lists what can be modified but lacks clarity on required inputs (subscription ID), return value, and side effects on billing. Enhanced description specifies inputs, outputs, side effects, and partial update support for comprehensive AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Modify subscription details such as payment method, recurring charge, and proration settings.
data.description_suggestion: Modifies an existing subscription's configuration including payment method, recurring charge amount, and proration settings. Requires the subscription ID and fields to update. Returns the updated subscription object. Side effects include potential changes to billing cycles and future charge amounts. Supports partial updates - only provided fields are modified.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear. Description lists what can be modified but lacks clarity on required inputs (subscription ID), return value, and side effects on billing. Enhanced description specifies inputs, outputs, side effects, and partial update support for comprehensive AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'cancelSubscription' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description is minimal and lacks details on required inputs, return value, and important side effects (charge cessation, customer notification, record retention). Enhanced description provides comprehensive information for AI agents to understand the full impact of this operation.

data.current_description: Cancel an active subscription by its ID.
data.description_suggestion: Cancels an active subscription by its ID, terminating the recurring payment plan. Requires the subscription ID. Returns confirmation of cancellation with the updated subscription object showing cancelled status. Side effects include immediate cessation of future recurring charges and notification to the customer. The subscription record is retained for historical purposes.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description is minimal and lacks details on required inputs, return value, and important side effects (charge cessation, customer notification, record retention). Enhanced description provides comprehensive information for AI agents to understand the full impact of this operation.

Operation 'onboardMerchant' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear and action-oriented. data.current_description: Submit a new merchant onboarding application with business owner details, business information, and banking details.
data.description_suggestion: Submit a new merchant onboarding application with business owner details, business information, and banking details. Returns an application ID and initial status. The application enters a pending review state and will be processed asynchronously by the onboarding system.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description lacks information about what is returned (application ID, status) and the side effect that the application enters a pending state for asynchronous processing. Enhanced description provides return value and state change information for better AI agent understanding of operation outcomes.

message: Operation 'updateInvoiceStatus' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original summary is generic. Description mentions preventing access but doesn't clarify required inputs (invoice ID, status value) or what is returned. Added clarity on inputs, outputs, and side effects for better AI agent decision-making about when to use this operation.

data.current_description: Modify an invoice's status to prevent customer access, typically by changing it to Cancelled.
data.summary_suggestion: Update invoice status and access permissions
data.description_suggestion: Modifies an invoice's status to control customer access. Typically used to cancel invoices and prevent further customer interaction. Requires the invoice ID and target status. Returns the updated invoice object. Side effects include immediate revocation of customer access to the invoice.
data.reasoning: Original summary is generic. Description mentions preventing access but doesn't clarify required inputs (invoice ID, status value) or what is returned. Added clarity on inputs, outputs, and side effects for better AI agent decision-making about when to use this operation.

message: Operation 'createSmsReminder' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description is vague about what 'follow' means and lacks details on required inputs, return value, and scheduling side effects. Enhanced description clarifies the reminder configuration, inputs needed, response, and automatic delivery behavior.

data.current_summary: Create and send an SMS reminder for an invoice
data.current_description: Configure automatic reminder messages that follow an original SMS invoice.
data.description_suggestion: Creates and sends an automatic SMS reminder message for an invoice. Configures reminder timing and message content to follow an original SMS invoice. Requires invoice ID and reminder configuration parameters. Returns confirmation of the reminder creation. Side effects include scheduling automatic message delivery to the customer.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description is vague about what 'follow' means and lacks details on required inputs, return value, and scheduling side effects. Enhanced description clarifies the reminder configuration, inputs needed, response, and automatic delivery behavior.

message: Operation 'getSubscriptions' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is clear. Description mentions the ActiveOnly parameter but lacks context about what is returned and the scope (business-level retrieval). Added clarity on return value structure and filtering behavior for better AI agent understanding of available options.

data.current_description: Retrieve subscriptions. Set ActiveOnly to true to retrieve only active subscriptions.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all subscriptions for the authenticated business. Accepts an optional ActiveOnly parameter to filter results to only active subscriptions. Returns a list of subscription objects with details including customer, payment method, and status. Supports filtering to improve query efficiency.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear. Description mentions the ActiveOnly parameter but lacks context about what is returned and the scope (business-level retrieval). Added clarity on return value structure and filtering behavior for better AI agent understanding of available options.

data.current_description: Retrieve detailed information for a specific subscription.

message: Operation 'cancelSubscription' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear. Description is minimal and lacks details about required input format, return value, and important side effects (stopping charges, customer notification). data.current_description: Cancel an active subscription by its ID.
data.description_suggestion: Cancels an active subscription by its ID, terminating the recurring payment plan. Requires the subscription ID as input. Returns confirmation of cancellation with the updated subscription status. Side effects include stopping all future recurring charges and notifying the customer of cancellation.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear. Description is minimal and lacks details about required input format, return value, and important side effects (stopping charges, customer notification). Enhanced description clarifies inputs, outputs, and state changes for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Updates customer information. Either ExternalID or IndividualID must be provided to identify the customer.

data.current_description: Retrieve messages sent to and received by a business through Everyware's platform.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves messages sent to and received by a business through the Everyware platform. Accepts filter criteria via request body to narrow results by date range, message type, contact, or other parameters. Returns an array of message objects containing sender, recipient, content, timestamp, and delivery status. Supports both SMS and MMS messages.
data.reasoning: Current description is too generic and lacks details about filtering capabilities, expected inputs, and response structure. data.current_description: Retrieve SMS messages with various filter criteria including date range, direction, and contact information.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves SMS messages filtered by date range, message direction (inbound/outbound), contact information, and other criteria specified in the request. Does not modify message state or mark messages as read.

data.current_summary: Send a message using a pre-created template
data.current_description: Send SMS or MMS messages to contacts using pre-created templates from the Everyware Portal.

Messages are queued for immediate delivery through the messaging platform.

data.current_description: Create and send individual invoice links by text, email or both.

data.current_description: Submit a non-Everyware invoice into the system for queuing and delivery through messaging channels.
data.description_suggestion: Submits a non-Everyware-generated invoice into the Everyware system for queuing and delivery through SMS, email, or other messaging channels.
